steps.title: Keep the name restrictive
steps.content: The sentence needs a noun phrase identifying which Nigerian expressionist painter was known for the described style. The name is essential identifying information, so it should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Reject broken punctuation
steps.content: A uses unnecessary paired commas, B inserts a period that breaks the sentence, and D creates an awkward one-comma interruption. The sentence needs the title and name to flow directly into the verb phrase. The answer is C.
